name: Microwave Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease an 8-inch square dish and set aside.
2. In a medium, heat-resistant, non-metallic mixing bowl, combine the confectioners' sugar and cocoa; stir to mix thoroughly.
3. Add milk and butter to the sugar-cocoa mixture. Stir just enough to incorporate all ingredients without overmixing (a well can be created in the sugar mixture before adding the butter and milk).
4. Microwave on full power for 2 minutes, uncovered.
5. After microwaving, gently stir until everything is combined.
6. Add vanilla and chopped nuts; stir until fully blended.
7. Transfer to the prepared dish and refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting and serving.
Valerie's Note: Enjoy the fudge squares with a large bowl of hot buttered popcorn while watching your favorite movie and spending quality time with someone special.
